label: commit-push
command:
git add -A && git commit -m "feat: CLI distribution — pc init/run/status/log + npm publish ready

CLI (src/bin/pc.ts):
  pc init      → interactive BriefCollector, creates 4 memory files
  pc run [b]   → orchestrator (reads MISSION.md if no brief)
  pc status    → shows STATE.md
  pc log       → shows DECISIONS.md
  pc help/version

Package distribution:
  - bin: { pc: dist/bin/pc.js }
  - exports: ./memory, ./orchestrator, ./agent, ./brief
  - files: dist, README, LICENSE, .env.example
  - prepublishOnly: npm run build
  - 3 install modes: npx, npm -g, git clone

README.md updated:
  - Quick Start: Option A (npx), B (global), C (clone)
  - CLI commands table
  - Programmatic import examples

New files:
  - src/bin/pc.ts — CLI entry point
  - .env.example — ANTHROPIC_API_KEY template
  - LICENSE — MIT

Karar: D019
Tests: 10 CLI tests (help, version, status, log, run error)
TypeScript: strict, 0 error" && git.exe push origin master 2>&1
